blocksizeWars.question: Kiki ekyaliwo mu ntalo za Blocksize
blocksizeWars.text:
Obuzibu buno buleetawo okukubaganya ebirowoozo mu bantu ba Bitcoin ku ngeri esingayo obulungi ey'okukulaakulanyamu omukutu gwa Bitcoin, ogutera okuyitibwa entalo z'obunene bwa Bulooka.

Amakampuni mu nkola ya Bitcoin zaawakana nti okwongera ku bunene bwa bulooka, nga kino kye kisinga obunene bwa bulooka ey'okuwaanyisiganya ku blockchain, kijja kusobozesa okutambuza ebintu ebingi okukolebwa buli katikitiki, okufuula omukutu ogwo okuba ogw'omugaso era nga gusobola okukola ku bungi bw'emirimu.

Abakozesa Bitcoin ku ludda olulala olw'okukubaganya ebirowoozo baagambye nti okwongera ku bunene bwa bulooka kijja kuteeka omukutu guno mu kifo ekya wakati, kubanga kyandibadde kyetaagisa kompyuta ez'ebbeeyi era ez'amaanyi okusobola okukola ku bulooka ennene, era kiyinza okuviirako Bitcoin okufuuka ey'okukebera.

Abakozesa mu nkomerero baawangula mu kukuuma obutafugibwa n'okwekenneenya-okuziyiza omukutu gwa Bitcoin era ne balaga nti Bitcoin efugibwa abakozesa, so si kkampuni. Kino era kyali kitegeeza nti okukulaakulanya Bitcoin kyandibadde kyetaagisa eky'enjawulo mubyokukanika eky'okukola okusinga okwongera ku bunene bwa bulooka.
blocksizeWars.title: Entalo z'obunene bwa Bulooka

Yogaayoga! Nga ekintu ekisanyusa, Lightning Network eyambye okwongera okwettanira Bitcoin nga bagikkiriza okukola emirimu mingi buli sikonda n’okukola ku bungi bw’okutunda
Si kituufu! Lightning Network mu butuufu ye kingonjoola okupimibwa ezimbiddwa waggulu ku nkola ya Bitcoin. Gezaako nate
Si kituufu! Lightning Network mu butuufu emalawo obwetaavu bwa buli nkolagana okugattibwa ku Bitcoin blockchain, kuba esobozesa okusasula okutono okukolebwa off-chain.
lightningNetwork.question: Omukutu gwa Lightning Network gukola ki
lightningNetwork.text:
Nga abakozesa bawangula era ne bakuuma okugabanya omukutu gwa Bitcoin, eky’okugonjoola okulinnyisa Bitcoin ekyateesebwako abanoonyereza Tadge Dryja ne Joseph Poon, ekiyitibwa Lightning Network, kyatandika okufuna okusika era kyatongozebwa mu 2017.

Omukutu gwa Laddu, gutera okuyitibwa Lightning oba LN yokka, ye nkola y'okutegerageranya eyazimbibwa waggulu ku nkola ya Bitcoin. Kyanguyiza okusasula okutono, kumpi okw’amangu wakati w’abakozesa ku ssente entono ennyo era kimalawo obwetaavu bwa buli nkolagana okugattibwa ku Bitcoin blockchain ate nga kikakasa nti omuwendo ogukolebwa gugoberera amateeka g’omukutu gwa Bitcoin.
lightningNetwork.title: Omukutu gwa Laddu

Si kituufu! Ku mutimbagano gwa Bitcoin, emirimu gikuŋŋaanyizibwa mu bulooka ezigattibwa ku blockchain nga buli luvannyuma lwa ddakiika 10. Wabula ku mukutu gwa  Lightning Network, okusasula tekyetaagisa kulinda kukakasa bulooka okutwalibwa ng’obukuumi. Gezaako nate

instantPayments.question: Kitwala bbanga ki okusasula okutwalibwa ng’obukuumi ku Lightning Network
instantPayments.text:
Mu mutimbagano gwa Bitcoin, emirimu gikuŋŋaanyizibwa wamu mu bulooka, era bulooka empya zongerwa ku blockchain nga buli luvannyuma lwa ddakiika 10. Okusasula bwe kukolebwa nga okozesa Bitcoin, kutwalibwa ng’obukuumi oluvannyuma lw’okukakasibwa bulooka mukaaga, oba essaawa nga emu.

Ku Lightning Network, okusasula tekulina kulinda kukakasa bulooka okutwalibwa ng’obukuumi. Wabula, zibeera za mangu era zimalirizibwa omulundi gumu mu sikonda ntono.

Kino kisobozesa okukozesa Lightning Network okukola emirimu gy’okutunda, okusasula okuva ku muntu omu, oba embeera endala yonna gy’olina okusasula mu bwangu.
instantPayments.title: Ensasula za Kagwirawo

Si bwe kiri ddala! Wadde nga omukutu gwa Lightning gukkiriza okusobola okusasula micropayment, micropayment tetegeezebwa nga nsasula ekoleddwa nga tukozesa Lightning Network. Gezaako nate!
micropayments.question: Micropayment kye ki
micropayments.text:
Micropayments kitegeeza enkolagana y’ensimbi entono ennyo, emirundi mingi ku ssente ezitasukka ddoola emu. Ebika by’okusasula bino biyinza okuba ebizibu okukola nga tukozesa enkola z’ebyensimbi ez’ennono, kubanga bitera okuba n’ensimbi entono eziyinza okukyusibwa n’ebisale ebigere ebiyinza okufuula okusasula okutono obutaba kwa mugaso.

Omukutu gwa Lightning Network gukkiriza okusobola okukola micropayments nga okozesa Bitcoin. Kisobozesa abakozesa okusindika ssente entono ennyo eza Bitcoin, okukka ku 1 sat, awatali bulabe bwa kufiirwa buyinza ku nsimbi zaabwe eri omuntu ow'okusatu (ekiyitibwa "custodial risk").

Okwawukanako n’ekyo, Bitcoin blockchain mu kiseera kino erina ssente entono ez’okutunda n’ebisale ebifuula micropayments obutaba ya mugaso. Lightning Network ekkiriza okusasula okutono okuli mu Bitcoin, nga bakozesa enkolagana entuufu eya Bitcoin. Kino kiggulawo okusobola okutondawo obutale obupya n’okufuula okusasula okutono okubeera okw’omugaso.
micropayments.title: Okusasula ssente entonotono

scalability.question: Lwaki obusobozi bw'okusibwe mu sayizi kikulu eri omukutu gwa Bitcoin
scalability.text:
Scalability kitegeeza obusobozi bw’enkola, gamba ng’omukutu oba omukutu, okukwata enkozesa oba entambula ennene nga tefunye nsonga oba kukendeera.

Scalability kikulu eri Bitcoin kubanga omukutu gujja kwetaaga okusobola okuwagira omuwendo omunene ennyo ogw’okutunda okusobola okutuukiriza obwetaavu bw’okusasula eby’amaguzi n’okusasula mu ngeri ey’obwengula.

Lightning Network esobozesa abakozesa okukola emirimu kumpi egitalina kkomo wakati wa bannaabwe ebweru wa Bitcoin blockchain, oba off-chain.

Kino kitegeeza nti emirimu gisobola okukolebwa nga tekyetaagisa buli emu okuwandiikibwa ku blockchain, ekiyamba okukendeeza ku mugugu ku mutimbagano n’okugusobozesa okukola emirimu mingi.

paymentChannels.text:

Oyinza okulowooza ku mukutu gwa Lightning nga okuggulawo tab ku bbaala y’omu kitundu kyo. Mu kifo ky’okuggyayo waleti yo n’osasula buli lw’olagira eky’okunywa, kikola amakulu okukekkereza obudde, amaanyi ne ssente ng’obala ebyokunywa byo byonna awamu ku nkomerero y’ekiro n’okola okusasula okusembayo mu kusasula omulundi gumu.

Omulabe nagukola mu ngeri y’emu. Buli lwe wabaawo okusasula okuva ku muntu A okutuuka ku muntu B, bitcoin zisindikibwa okuva ku ludda olumu olw’omukutu okudda ku lulala. Abakozesa babiri basobola okusasulagana okudda n’okudda emirundi mingi nga bwe baagala, kumpi mu kaseera ako era nga kumpi tebasasula bisale.

routing.question: Omukutu gwa Laddu gukkiriza gutya abakozesa okusasula bannaabwe singa tebakwatagana butereevu nga bayita mu nkola y'okusasula
routing.text:
Oyinza okuba ng’olowooza nti okuteekawo omukutu gw’okusasula nga gulimu ebikumi n’ebikumi bya bizinensi kiyinza okukukooya, naye nedda. Obulungi bw'omukutu gwa Laddu nti mutimbagano gwa mikutu egyatungibwa wamu.

Ka tugambe nti Bob yamatiza mukwano gwe Carol naye okwegatta ku Mukutu gwa Laddu. Alice alina omukutu ne Bob, ate Bob alina omukutu ne Carol. Olwo Alice ne Carol basobola okusasulagana nga bayita mu “kuyisa makubo” nga bayita mu Bob.

Obumu ku bukodyo bukakasa nti Bob tasobola kubba ssente nga zimuyitamu.

Bw’osasula ku Mukutu gwa Laddu, node yo enoonya ekkubo ly’emikutu wakati wo n’ekifo w’ogenda. Kino kye kiyitibwa okuyisa amakubo. Kino mazima ddala byonna bikolebwa mu ngeri ya otomatiki n’ennyiriri za Laddu ezikwatibwako, ekisobozesa okubaawo mu kaseera katono.

itsaBubble.question: Ewaanyisiganya ya bitcoin gutuuse gutya ku mutindo okumala ebbanga
itsaBubble.text:
Emyaka bwe gizze giyitawo, bitcoin etera okuyitibwa kiwujjo abantu ab’enjawulo. Wadde nga bbeeyi yaayo ebadde n’okukendeera okw’amaanyi okuwerako okuyinza okuba nga kwe kwaviirako akabonero kano, okutwalira awamu omuze gwa bitcoin gubadde gugenda waggulu buli kiseera.

Abavumirira abazze balangirira okufa kwa bitcoin oluvannyuma lwa buli enkulungo y’akatale bakakasiddwa nti bakyamu, anti ssente za digito ezitandise okukula wadde nga balagula. Nga abavumirira bano baggwaamu okugeraageranya kwe bayinza okukozesa, kyeyoleka bulungi nti bye balumiriza tebirina musingi.

itstooVolatile.question: Kiki ekikulu ekikwata ku kukyukakyuka kw’omuwendo gw’ensimbi za bitcoin
itstooVolatile.text:
Kiba kya muntu okusuubira nti bitcoin ejja kukuuma emiwendo egy’enjawulo, anti esuubulibwa essaawa yonna, buli lunaku mu mwaka, okwetoloola ensi yonna. Tewali bisaanyizo bya kwewandiisa, nnaku za bbanka, okumenya circuit, oba okununula mu katale ka bitcoin, akakola ng’akatale ak’eddembe ddala.

Okukyukakyuka kwonna era kwonna mu bbeeyi ya bitcoin kuva ku baguzi n’abatunzi okutuuka ku nzikiriziganya mu kiseera ekituufu awatali kutaataaganyizibwa okuva mu gavumenti. Nga bitcoin egenda mu maaso n’olugendo lwayo okutuuka ku kufuuka sitoowa y’omuwendo ey’ensi yonna esookerwako mu mulembe gw’amawulire, si kya mazima okulowooza nti enkulaakulana yaayo yandibadde ya layini.

Nga okwettanira bitcoin kweyongera, kifuuka kya bulabe nnyo era ebiyinza okulinnya bikendeera, ekivaako okukendeera mu kukyukakyuka.

itsnotBacked.question: Kiki kyokka ekiwanirira ssente zonna okusinziira ku Parker Lewis
itsnotBacked.text:
Ekirowoozo kya ssente eziwaniriddwa kikontana, kubanga obuyambi bwennyini olwo bwanditwaliddwa nga ssente. Ekitundu ku muwendo gwa ssente kiva ku butono bwazo. Bitcoin tekyetaagisa kuwagirwa kintu kirala ekitali kya bulijjo kubanga mu butonde ya bbula.

Okukakasibwa era okubalirirwa okuyita mu ngeri ezeetongodde, bitcoin terimu bulabe bwa kibiina kirala. Tewali muntu wa kusatu alina kwesigika okukuuma n’okukuuma ebintu oba eby’obugagga. Bwe kiba nga waliwo ekintu kyonna, kisoboka okuba nti ebiseera eby’omu maaso bijja kuwagirwa bitcoin.

Nga Parker Lewis bwe yagamba nti, "Mu nkomerero, bitcoin ewagirwa ekintu, era kye kintu kyokka ekiwanirira ssente zonna: obwesige bw'ebintu byayo eby'ensimbi."

willbecomeObsolete.question: Kisoboka bitcoin okufuuka etaliiko mugaso olunaku lumu
willbecomeObsolete.text:
Bitcoin ekiikirira okuzuula okw’enjawulo okw’ebbula ery’enkomeredde, okufaananako n’okuzuula omuliro, amasannyalaze, oba ekitundu ky’okubala.

Si kya magezi oba kisoboka okuvuganya ne bitcoin mu nsonga z’ebbula, anti tewali ddaala lya bbula erisinga ku bbula ery’enkomeredde. Okunenya bitcoin okulowoozebwa nti obuzibu oba obuzibu bulowooza nti tewali kusuubulagana mu nsonga z’obukuumi n’okusikiriza dizayini, oba nti enkola ya bitcoin eriwo kati tewa dda migaso gya maanyi eri obukadde n’obukadde bw’abakozesa.

Nga omukutu ogukula amangu, ogutaliiko bukwakkulizo nga gukola ebitundu 99.98% mu myaka egisukka mu kkumi, nga gukoze ku buwumbi bwa ddoola mu muwendo era nga gukuumibwa obuwumbi bwa ddoola mu hardware, tekisuubirwa nti bitcoin ejja kusengulwa ng’omukutu gw’ensimbi ogwa digito ogusinga ku kino okusonga.

Nga Michael Saylor bwe yagamba nti, "Tewabangawo kyakulabirako kya mutimbagano gwa digito ogw'ekisolo kya doola 100B ogwawangulwa oluvannyuma lw'okutuuka mu kifo ekyo ekifuga."

toomuchEnergy.question: bitcoin ekola etya ku nkozesa y'amasannyalaze mu nsi yonna
toomuchEnergy.text:
Bitcoin ssente za digito ezisaasaanyiziddwa era ezituukirirwa abakozesa okwetoloola ensi yonna era nga teziyinza kusengekebwa olw’enkola yaayo eya Proof of Work.

Nga mu kiseera kino abantu ababalirirwamu obuwumbi buna babeera wansi w’obufuzi obw’ekibogwe, bitcoin etuwa engeri abantu ssekinnoomu gye bayinza okusindika, okufuna, okutereka, n’okutambuza obugagga. Kikulu okulowooza ku bungi bw’amaanyi omukutu gw’ensimbi nga guno gwe gulina okukozesa n’okwekenneenya n’obwegendereza ani asinga okubeera n’ebikozesebwa okusalawo ku nsonga eno.

Engeri emu ey’okulowooza ku ngeri bitcoin gy’ekwata ku nkozesa y’amasoboza mu nsi yonna kwe kulowooza ku maapu y’ensi yonna, ng’ebisale by’amasannyalaze mu ggwanga bikiikirira entikko n’ebifo. Okwongera bitcoin mu kutabula kiringa okuyiwa egiraasi y’amazzi ku maapu - esenga mu biyumba, n’ezigonza. Kino kiri bwe kityo kubanga bitcoin egula amaanyi mu nsi yonna ku bbeeyi egere, ekiyamba okugeraageranya ensaasaanya y’amaanyi agakozesebwa okwetoloola ensi yonna.

internetDependent.question: Empanyisiganya ya bitcoin eyinza etya okusindikibwa singa wabaawo okutaataaganyizibwa kwa yintaneeti
internetDependent.text:
Waliwo akabi, ddala, nti yintaneeti eyinza okubula olw’ebikozesebwa okulemererwa, obutyabaga obw’obutonde, oba okuvaako mu bugenderevu. Wabula kisoboka okukola emirimu gya bitcoin ng’okozesa enkola ezitali ku mukutu n’emikutu emirala egy’empuliziganya.

Okugeza, enkolagana ya bitcoin eriko omukono esobola okuweebwayo ku node emu n’eweebwa ku mutimbagano okuteekebwa mu bbulooka abasimi. Waliwo engeri ez’enjawulo ez’okukola kino, gamba ng’okusindika enkolagana ng’oyita mu bubaka bwa SMS, okukozesa waleti ey’omubiri ng’erina ekisumuluzo eky’ekyama ekirabika ng’okozesa omulundi gumu, oba okufuna bulooka ng’oyita ku setilayiti. Enkola zino zisobozesa bitcoin okukozesebwa ne bwe wabaawo okutaataaganyizibwa kwa yintaneeti.

forcrimeOnly.question: Kituufu okugamba nti ebintu bya bitcoin bivuddeko okutwalira awamu okweyongera kw’ebikolwa by’obumenyi bw’amateeka
forcrimeOnly.text:
Bitcoin kikozesebwa ekitaliimu ludda mu kuwaanyisiganya omuwendo, era tekirina nzikiriza, ndowooza oba mpisa za butonde. Amakulu gaayo gasalibwawo engeri gye gakozesebwamu. Si kituufu okugamba nti ebintu bya bitcoin bivuddeko okutwalira awamu okweyongera kw’ebikolwa by’obumenyi bw’amateeka.

Obumenyi bw’amateeka tebusibuka mu kufuna bikozesebwa, wabula buva mu mbeera z’omuntu kinnoomu. Singa bitcoin eba ya mugaso, esobola okukozesebwa omuntu yenna, omuli n’abamenyi b’amateeka. Bwe kiba nga tekirina mugaso, tekiyinza kukozesebwa muntu yenna, nga mw’otwalidde n’abamenyi b’amateeka.

Nga Parker Lewis bwe yagamba nti, "Tewali kintu kyonna kya buzaale ku bikozesebwa ebikozesebwa okwanguyiza emisango ekigifuula emisango ku bwabyo. Wadde nga gikozesebwa mu bumenyi bw'amateeka, tewali muntu yenna asaba kuwera nguudo, yintaneeti, mail, n'ebirala."
forcrimeOnly.title: Bitcoin ya bamenyi b'amateeka

Nedda, nsonyiwa! Bitcoin si nteekateeka ya kuteeka ssente mu nkola nyangu okufuna ate era n'okikyusa n'okugabana kubanga endabika yaakyo eri abantu bonna. Naye hey, waakiri oyiga ku nsonga eyo, nedda?
ponziScheme.question: Ku bigambo bino wammanga ki ekituufu ku bitcoin
ponziScheme.text:
Okuyita bitcoin ponzi scheme kiraga obutategeera byombi bitcoin n’ennyonnyola ya ponzi scheme. Enteekateeka ya ponzi erimu okusuubiza okuzzaayo ssente waggulu w’akatale eri bamusigansimbi, naye ng’omukutu ogutalina lukusa, bitcoin terina buyinza bwa wakati obusobola okukola ebisuubizo ng’ebyo.

Okugatta ku ekyo, bitcoin si nteekateeka ya kusiga nsimbi, wabula ngeri ya ssente. Okwawukanako n’emikisa gy’okusiga ensimbi egitategeerekeka egiyinza okutumbulwa eri abantu ssekinnoomu abatategedde, koodi ya bitcoin ya nsibuko nzigule era okugiwa esobola okukakasibwa mu bwetwaze ekiseera kyonna.
ponziScheme.title: Bitcoin nteekateeka ya kifere

answers: Okusasula ku kaadi kuyita mu bibiina ebiwerako nga tekunnatuuka ku musuubuzi, ate okusasula kwa bitcoin kugenda butereevu eri oyo afuna ssente awatali batabaganya
Okusasula ku kaadi y’ebbanja kuba kwa nkomerero nga bamaze okukakasibwa, ate okusasula kwa bitcoin kuyinza okukyusibwa
naye waakiri oyiga ku bitcoin
feedback: Tuyozaayoza nnyo! Osumuludde obumanyirivu obusembayo mu kusasula bitcoin. Olabika okitegedde nti bitcoin ekola nga tewali banka enkulu oba omukulembeze omu
Uh oh, kirabika oyinza okuba nga ofunye eky'okuddamu ekikyamu, naye waakiri oyiga ku bitcoin
Nedda, bambi! Okusasula ku kaadi z’ebbanja kusengekebwa buli kiseera, naye gezaako bulungi. Sigala ng'oyiga ku bitcoin!
bitcoinisTooSlow.question: Njawulo ki enkulu wakati w’okusasula ne credit card n’okusasula ne bitcoin on-chain
bitcoinisTooSlow.text:
Okusasula ne bitcoin si kye kimu n’okukozesa credit card okugula. Bw’okozesa kaadi y’okuwola, ssente z’osasula ziyita mu bantu abawera nga tezinnaba kutuuka ku akawunti y’omusuubuzi mu bbanka oluvannyuma lw’ennaku oba wadde wiiki ng’okola.

Okwawukanako n’ekyo, bw’osasula ne bitcoin ku blockchain enkulu, oba osindika ssente entuufu butereevu eri oyo azifuna awatali mutabaganya yenna. Kino kitegeeza nti tewali bulabe bwa kusengejja era okutunda kutwalibwa ng’okusembayo nga kumaze okukakasibwa bulooka mukaaga ku blockchain.

Okugerageranya okutuufu kwandibadde wakati wa bitcoin base layer ne Fed nga omugabi w'ensimbi era nga asaanyawo enkola.

Okuva omukutu gwa Lightning we gwajja, okunenya "Bitcoin ya mpola" okusinga kusirise.
bitcoinisTooSlow.title: Bitcoin ekola mpola nnyo

answers: Okuyita mu nkola y’okukkaanya mu bitundu ebitali bimu nga buli nkolagana ekakasibbwa mu ngeri eyetongodde n’ennyiriri eziri ku mutimbagano
Nga bayita mu nkola ey’omu kifo ekimu ng’ekitongole kimu kifuga okufulumya ebinusu ebipya
Nga bateekawo omuwendo ogusinga obunene ku muwendo ogutali gwa bulijjo, gamba ng’obukadde 100
feedback: Tuyozaayoza nnyo! Osumuludde obumanyirivu obusembayo mu kugaba bitcoin. Obadde okimanyi nti obutonde bw’omukutu gwa bitcoin obutafaananako busobozesa obwerufu obusingawo, anti buli nkolagana ekakasibbwa mu ngeri eyetongodde nodes ku mutimbagano
Nedda, bambi! Okugabibwa kwa Bitcoin tekufugibwa kitongole kya wakati. Gezaako nate
Uh oh, kirabika oyinza okuba nga wafuna eky’okuddamu ekikyamu. Omuwendo ogusinga obunene ogwa bitcoin guteekeddwa ku bukadde 21, so si bukadde 100. Naye waakiri oli mukuyiga ku bitcoin!
supplyLimit.question: Okugabibwa kwa bitcoin kukuumibwa kutya obutayonooneka
supplyLimit.text:
Obutonde bwa Bitcoin obw’okusaasaanya obuyinza busobozesa okugiwa okukakasibwa mu bwetwaze buli node ku mutimbagano, okukakasa nti tesobola kwonooneka. Kino kituukibwako nga tuyita mu nkola ey’okukkaanya nga buli nkolagana ekakasiddwa ku mutimbagano gwa bitcoin ekakasibbwa mu ngeri eyetongodde.

Wadde nga omuntu yenna asobola okufuka koodi n’akola enkyukakyuka mu mateeka, tekisuubirwa nti enkyusa eno eya koodi yanditwaliddwa omukutu omugazi. Enkola y’okukkaanya mu bitundu ebitali bimu n’okugabibwa kwa bitcoin okutavunda bikulu nnyo mu kusikiriza kwayo ng’engeri ya ssente.

Omuwendo ogusinga obunene ogwa bitcoin guteekeddwa ku bukadde 21, era okugezaako kwonna okwongera ku kkomo lino kyandibadde kyetaagisa okukkaanya okuva mu kitundu ekinene eky’omukutu gwa bitcoin, ekintu ekitali kya bulijjo nnyo.
supplyLimit.title: Ekomo ku nsasanya ya Bitcoin eyinza Okwononeka

answers: Nedda, kubanga obutonde bw’omukutu gwa bitcoin obutafaananako buzibu okussa mu nkola envumbo
Yee, nga tulemesa okutondebwa kw'ennukuta ezitali za bulijjo
Yee, nga oggalawo yintaneeti
feedback: Kituufu. Obutonde bw’omukutu gwa bitcoin obutafaananako buzibu okussa mu nkola envumbo
Nedda, busiru! Wadde nga mu by’ekikugu kisoboka gavumenti okuwera bitcoin, kumpi kyandibadde tekisoboka kussa mu nkola nvumbo ng’eyo. Gezaako nate
Uh oh, kirabika oyinza okuba nga wafuna eky’okuddamu ekikyamu. Okuggala yintaneeti tekyandikomye bantu kukozesa bitcoin.
governmentBan.question: Gavumenti zisobola okuwera obulungi bitcoin
governmentBan.text:
Mu by’ekikugu kisoboka gavumenti okuwera bitcoin, naye okussa mu nkola okuwera ng’okwo kyandibadde kizibu olw’obutonde bw’omukutu gwa bitcoin ogw’okusaasaanyizibwa.

Bitcoin yeesigamye ku bisumuluzo eby’obwannannyini, nga zino nnamba za random zokka, okufuga okutuuka ku nkolagana eziwandiikiddwa ku blockchain. Ebisumuluzo bino eby’ekyama bisobola okukolebwa ne biterekebwa wonna, ekibifuula okusinga obutazuulibwa.

Okugatta ku ekyo, ebikozesebwa ebyetaagisa okuyingira ku mutimbagano gwa bitcoin byangu nnyo era bisangibwa nnyo, ekyanguyira abantu okukakasa emirimu nga tebalina bwesige.

Nga Saifedean Ammous bwe yagamba nti, "Okuwera bitcoin si kya njawulo nnyo na kugezaako kuwera kubala. Kijja kumala kukakasa omugaso gwayo & kivuga abantu bangi okukituukako."
governmentBan.title: Gavumenti zigenda kuwera Bitcoin

answers: Yee, naye waleti zino z'okugulaana ezirina bakasitoma obukadde n’obukadde
Yee, era waleti zino za bantu ssekinnoomu abakung’aanyizza ssente nnyingi eza bitcoin
Nedda, ekitundu ekisinga obunene ekya bitcoin kigabibwa kyenkanyi mu muwendo omunene ogw’abakozesa
feedback: Tuyozaayoza nnyo! Osumuludde obumanyirivu bwa waleti bwa bitcoin obusembayo. Obadde okimanyi nti okutwalira awamu kitwalibwa ng’enkola esinga obulungi okukuuma bitcoin mu waleti eyeekyaza olw’ensonga z’obukuumi n’ekyama

Nedda, bambi! Wadde nga kituufu mu by’ekikugu nti waleti entono ze zikwata ekitundu ekisinga obunene ku bitcoin zonna, waleti zino tezirina kuba za bantu ssekinnoomu abakung’aanyizza ssente nnyingi eza bitcoin. Sigala ng'oyiga ku bitcoin
Uh oh, kirabika oyinza okuba nga wafuna eky’okuddamu ekikyamu. Engabanya ya bitcoin mu bakozesa tekitegeeza nti ya bwenkanya. Naye waakiri oyiga ku bitcoin!
concentratedOwnership.question: Kituufu nti waleti entono ze zikwata ekitundu ekisinga obunene ku bitcoin zonna
concentratedOwnership.text:
Kitera okugambibwa nti waleti entono ze zikwata ekitundu ekisinga obunene ku bitcoin zonna. Wadde nga kino kituufu mu by’ekikugu, kikulu okumanya nti waleti zino zitera kuba za bifo ebiwanyisiganya ssente ebirina bakasitoma obukadde n’obukadde.

Abantu bangi basalawo okuleka bitcoin yaabwe ku exchange, naye okutwalira awamu kitwalibwa ng’enkola esinga obulungi okukuuma bitcoin mu waleti ey’obuntu olw’ensonga z’obukuumi n’ekyama.

Era kirungi okumanya nti endagiriro ya bitcoin emu esobola okubaamu bitcoin ey’abakozesa abawera, era omukozesa omu asobola okufuga waleti eziwera. Okusobola okukuuma eby’ekyama, kirungi okukola endagiriro empya ku buli nkolagana efuna mu kifo ky’okuddamu okukozesa endagiriro y’emu.
concentratedOwnership.title: Obwannannyini bwa Bitcoin Butekeddwaako ekirowoozo Ku Bakozesa Batono

answers: Nedda, kubanga balina ekisikiriza eky’amaanyi okugoberera amateeka g’omukutu n’okukuuma obulungi bwa blockchain
Yee, kubanga balina amaanyi ga hashing agasinga obungi
Yee, naye nga beekolera ku lwabwe
feedback: Yee, ekyo kituufu. Obadde okimanyi nti obutonde bw’omukutu gwa bitcoin ogw’okugabanya obuyinza bukakasa nti tewali kitongole kimu, omuli n’ebifo eby’okusima eby’obugagga, kiyinza kutaataaganya mutimbagano oba okusengejja emirimu

Nedda, bambi! Wadde nga ebidiba by’eby’okusima eby’obugagga birina amaanyi amangi ag’okusima, abasimi ssekinnoomu batambula nnyo era basobola okulung’amya hashrate yaabwe mu ngeri etali ya maanyi eri ekidiba ky’eby’okusima eby’obugagga eky’amazima

Si kituufu. Wadde nga kituufu nti ebifo ebisima eby’obugagga eby’omu ttaka birina ekisikiriza okukola mu kwefaako kwabyo, kino tekitegeeza nti bisobola okutaataaganya omukutu gwa bitcoin oba okusengejja emirimu.
centralizedMining.question: Ebibiina ebisima ensimbi bisobola okutaataaganya omukutu gwa bitcoin oba okukebera enkolagana
centralizedMining.text:
Abantu abamu balowooza nti ebifo ebisima eby’obugagga, nga bino bibinja by’abasima eby’obugagga ebikolagana okwongera ku mikisa gyabwe egy’okuzuula bbulooka, biyinza okutaataaganya omukutu gwa bitcoin oba okusengejja emirimu.

Wabula okweraliikirira kuno kuva ku butategeera bisikiriza abasima eby’obugagga n’omulimu gwabwe mu mutimbagano. Mu butuufu, abasimi balina ekisikiriza eky’amaanyi okugoberera amateeka g’omukutu n’okukuuma obulungi bwa blockchain, anti amagoba gaabwe bennyini geesigamye ku yo.

Nga Jimmy Song bwe yagamba nti, "Obungi bw'amaanyi ga hashing tesobola: kutwala ssente z'olina edda, okukyusa amateeka ga bitcoin, oba okukulumya nga tezerumya."
centralizedMining.title: Ensimbi za Bitcoin Zisaasaayiziddwa

answers: Nga tugeraageranya akatale kwonna aka bitcoin n’aka ebika by’eby’obugagga ebirala
Nga tugeraageranya bbeeyi ya yuniti ya bitcoin emu ku bbeeyi ya yuniti y’eby’obugagga ebirala, gamba nga zaabu
Nga weebuuza ku mupiira gwa crystal n’ogenda nga okiwulirira mu mamiro
feedback: Tukuyozaayoza, oli ku kkubo ettuufu! Kikulu okulowooza ku katale konna aka bitcoin ng’ogeraageranya n’eby’obugagga ebirala. Obadde okimanyi nti akatale ka bitcoin katuuka ku kawumbi ka ddoola akasukka mu kamu mu 2021
Uh oh, kirabika oyinza okuba nga wagudde mu mutego gwa unit bias! Omukisa omulungi omulundi oguddako
Bambi, okwebuuza ku mupiira gwa crystal kiyinza okukola ku kuteebereza embeera y’obudde, naye si ngeri eyesigika ey’okukebera omuwendo gwa bitcoin. Omukisa omulungi omulundi oguddako!
tooExpensive.question: Oyinza otya okugeraageranya obulungi omuwendo gwa bitcoin ku by’obugagga ebirala
tooExpensive.text:
Endowooza emu enkyamu emanyiddwa ennyo ku bitcoin eri nti ya bbeeyi nnyo okugula.

Naye enzikiriza eno yeesigamiziddwa ku kusosola mu yuniti, kubanga kituufu nnyo okugeraageranya akatale kwonna aka bitcoin ku by’obugagga ebirala okusinga bbeeyi ya yuniti yokka eya bitcoin emu.

Era kirungi okumanya nti bitcoin emu esobola okugabanyizibwamu obutundutundu obutonotono obukadde 100 obuyitibwa satoshis. Nga bwe bagamba nti, "osobola okugula akatundu ka bitcoin!"
tooExpensive.title: Bitcoin ya bbeeyi nnyo

answers: Obulung’amu n’obwesigwa bw’omukutu gwa bitcoin nga omutendera gw’okusenza
Okukozesa emitendera ez’okubiri nga lightning, amazzi, oba enkola eya blockchain ekola awamu ne blockchain enkulu ku nkolagana entonotono
Eky’okuba nti bitcoin ekyali tekinologiya mupya nnyo era nga tennatuuka ku busobozi bwayo mu bujjuvu
feedback: Tukuyozaayoza, okubye omusumaali ku mutwe! Obulung’amu n’obwesigwa bw’omukutu gwa bitcoin mazima ddala bikola kinene mu kukuuma ssente z’okutunda nga ntono. Obadde okimanyi nti omukutu gwa bitcoin gusobola okukola emirimu egiwera 7 buli sikonda, ekigufuula ogw’amangu okusinga enkola ezimu ez’ennono ez’okusasula
Okugezaako okulungi, naye kirabika obuze amawulire amakulu. Gezaako nate
Bambi, naye okubeera tekinologiya omupya tekitegeeza nti kyenkana ssente entono ez’okutunda. Omukisa omulungi omulundi oguddako!
prohibitivelyHigh.question: Ensonga ki enkulu lwaki ssente z’okutunda ku mitendera enkulu eya bitcoin zisigala nga ntono nnyo bw’ogeraageranya n’enkola z’ebyensimbi ez’ennono
prohibitivelyHigh.text:
Endowooza endala enkyamu ku bitcoin eri nti ssente zaayo ez’okutunda ebintu ziwera nnyo.

Wabula, okutunda okukakasibwa ku layeri enkulu eya bitcoin kuwa omutendera gw’okusembayo ogutaliiko kye gufaanana mu nkola y’ebyensimbi ey’ennono. Wadde nga kituufu nti ssente z’okutunda ziyinza okulinnya oluusi n’oluusi olw’obusobozi obutono obwa buli bulooka, omukutu gwa bitcoin gusigala nga gwe musingi omulungi era ogwesigika ogw’okusasula emirimu egy’omuwendo omungi.

Mu butuufu, okusinziira ku Saifedean Ammous, "wakati wa October 2010 ne July 2021, ssente z'okutunda buli lunaku zaatuuka ku bitundu nga 0.02% ku muwendo gw'okutunda."

Okugatta ku ekyo, enkolagana entonotono, omuli n’enkolagana entonotono, zitera okusengulwa ne zigenda mu layers ez’okubiri nga okumyansa, amazzi, oba federated side-chains nga ebisale biba wansi nnyo okusinga ebyo ebiweebwa bbanka ez’amaduuka.
prohibitivelyHigh.title: Ebisale by’okutunda Bitcoin biri waggulu nnyo

Kisinziira ku bigendererwa by’omuntu ssekinnoomu n’ebiruubirirwa by’ebyensimbi

Uh oh, kirabika oyinza okuba nga wagudde mu ndowooza enkyamu ey’okukung’aanya! Okukwata bitcoin ngeri ya bulijjo ey’okwekuuma obutali bukakafu mu biseera eby’omu maaso era tekitegeeza nti tekozesebwa
Bambi, naye enjawulo wakati w’okukwata n’okukung’aanya bitcoin tesinziira ku bigendererwa by’omuntu ssekinnoomu n’ebiruubirirwa by’ebyensimbi. Omukisa omulungi omulundi oguddako!
willBeHoarded.question: Okukwata bitcoin kintu kye kimu n'okukung'aanya bitcoin
willBeHoarded.text:
Waliwo endowooza eya bulijjo nti okugaba kwa bitcoin okutakyukakyuka kusikiriza okukuŋŋaanya, oba ekikolwa ky’okukwata ku bitcoin okusinga okugisaasaanya mu by’enfuna.

Kyokka, ensonga eno erina obuzibu obutonotono. Ekisooka, okutereka, oba ekikolwa ky’okuteeka ssente ku bbali okukozesa mu biseera eby’omu maaso, kitera okutabula n’okukung’aanya. Mu butuufu, okutereka kintu kyetaagisa okusooka okuteeka ssente ennyingi era kiyinza okutunuulirwa ng’enkola ey’obuvunaanyizibwa mu by’ensimbi.

Ekyokubiri, okukwata ku bitcoin, oba ssente ez’engeri yonna, ngeri ya bulijjo ey’okwekuuma obutali bukakafu mu biseera eby’omu maaso era tekitegeeza nti tezikozesebwa.

Nga Pierre Rochard bwe yalambika, "bitcoin zonna bulijjo zikuumibwa muntu, okusasula kukyusa ani agikutte yokka." Mu ngeri endala, ekikolwa ky’okukwata bitcoin kyennyini nkozesa ya bitcoin.
willBeHoarded.title: Endowooza enkyamu ku Bitcoin Hoarding

answers: Enkola eno yeekenneenyezebwa nnyo era n’ekolebwa mu ngeri ey’obwegendereza, okukakasa nti obukuumi bwayo n’obwerufu

Eky'okuba nti kyangu okufuna ate era n'okikyusa n'okugabana kubanga endabika yaakyo eri abantu bonna kisobozesa enteekateeka y'eggwanga oba entegeka abantu gye batuuka ku buwanguzi oba okubeera n'ebifo eby'amaanyi okusinziira ku busobozi bwabwe n'obuvunaanyizibwa bwabwe, mu kifo ky'obugagga bwabwe oba embeera y'abantu era ekubiriza "Abantu bangi balina ekiroowozo kyekimu ku kye bamanyi" okuzimba eby'okugonjoola
Ewagirwa ekibinja kya bamusigansimbi ekinene era eky’amaanyi
feedback: Ekyo kituufu ddala! Mazima ddala koodi ya bitcoin yeekenneenyezebwa nnyo era n’ekolebwa mu ngeri ey’obwegendereza, ekyongera ku muwendo gwayo. Mu butuufu, @BTCSchellingPt yategeezezza nti Bitcoin Core osanga y’emu ku zisinga okwekenneenya ennyo code bases mu nsi yonna
Okugezaako okulungi, naye omugaso gwa bitcoin teguli mu code yaayo yokka wabula n'abantu n'ebikozesebwa ebigyetoolodde. Omukisa omulungi omulundi oguddako
Bambi, omuwendo gwa bitcoin tegusalibwawo buwagizi bwa kibinja kya bamusigansimbi bokka. Omukisa omulungi omulundi oguddako!
canBeDuplicated.question: Ensonga ki enkulu lwaki bitcoin etwalibwa ng’ey’omuwendo wadde nga code yaayo esobola okukoppebwa omuntu yenna
canBeDuplicated.text:
Ensonga emu ewakanya omuwendo gwa bitcoin eri nti si bbula kubanga waliwo enkumi n’enkumi za cryptocurrencies endala ezisangibwawo era kubanga omuntu yenna asobola okukoppa code n’akola enkola ye.

Wabula kino kibuusa amaaso nti bitcoin esingako ku kitundu kya koodi yokka. Ye nkola ya open source ey’okutambuza omuwendo esikiriza abantu n’eby’obugagga olw’obwerufu bwayo n’enkola yaayo enkakali ey’okukulaakulanya.

Nga @BTCSchellingPt bwe yategeezezza, "okueera nga buli muntu asobola okifuna kyitegeeza kifugibwa bantu nnyo. Ofunye obwongo bw'enjuki obuzimba eby'okungonjoola. Ofuna okwekenneenya okwo kwonna era ekyo kidda mu byokwerinda. Bitcoin Core osanga y'emu ku code bases ezisinga okwekenneenya ennyo mu." ensi."

Mu ngeri endala, omugaso gwa bitcoin teguli mu koodi yaayo yokka, wabula ne mu kitundu n’ebikozesebwa ebigyetoolodde.
canBeDuplicated.title: Bitcoin si ya bbula kubanga waliwo enkumi n’enkumi za cryptocurrencies

answers: Eky’obugagga ekitono mu bungi oba okubeerawo era ekiyinza okuvaako okuvuganya ku ky’okubeera nakyo
Ebyobugagga ebingi era ebyangu okufuna
Ekintu ekiyinza okufunibwa mu biseera ebyokutambula byokka
feedback: Okutegeezebwa:** Kituufu! Omulimu mulungi, wategedde endowooza y'ebbula. Ebbula liyinza okuvaako okuvuganya era liyinza okukosa omuwendo gw’ebintu n’obuweereza mu katale ak’eddembe
Kikyaamu! Nsonyiwa okutuusaako amawulire amabi, naye ekintu bwe kiba kyangu okujja, tekiyinza kuba kya bbula
Kikyaamu! Okutambula mu biseera kirowoozo kirungi nnyo ku firimu ya sci-fi, naye tekirina kakwate na bintu bitono.
scarcity.question: Kiki eky'obugagga eky'ebula
scarcity.text:
Bwe waba tewabaawo bikozesebwa bimala kutambula, abantu n’ebibiina bivuganya ku byo.

Okuvuganya kuno kutera okweyolekera mu bbeeyi y’ebintu n’obuweereza mu katale ak’eddembe. Singa obwetaavu bw’eky’obugagga ekimu bweyongera mangu okusinga ekiweebwayo, kiyinza okufuuka eky’ebbula era eky’omuwendo.

Ssente zitera okukozesebwa ng’engeri y’okugula ebintu kubanga nnyangu okusuubula ate nga za muwendo kubanga za bbula. Bitcoin ngeri ya ssente ya digito erimu ssente ezitakyukakyuka, ekigifuula etali ya bulijjo era ey’omuwendo.

Endowooza nti tewali kintu kimala kutambula musingi musingi gwa by’enfuna, naye kitera okubuusibwa amaaso mu kusalawo kw’ebyobufuzi.
scarcity.title: Engeri eby’obugagga ebitono gye bigabanyizibwamu n’okuvuganyizibwamu

answers: Enjawulo mu muwendo wakati w’enkozesa y’ekintu nga ssente n’omuwendo gwakyo olw’enkozesa yaakyo endala

monetaryPremium.question: Omutemwa gw’ensimbi kye ki
monetaryPremium.text:
Singa omuwendo gwa ssente tegusinziira ku bbula lyazo, guyinza obutaba gwesigika ng’engeri y’okuterekamu obugagga. Mu mbeera eno, ebintu ebirala ebitono, gamba ng’eby’obugagga ebiriwo oba eby’obugagga eby'okukozesa, biyinza okweyongera okuba eby’omuwendo ne bikozesebwa ng’ekifo kya ssente.

Omuwendo guno ogw’okwongerako gumanyiddwa nga omutemwa gw’ensimbi. Engeri ya ssente eya bulijjo bw’eba tekola bulungi, abantu bayinza okudda ku bintu ebirala ebitatera kubaawo oba ebizibu okufuna ng’engeri y’okuwanyisiganya omuwendo.

Ebika by’ensimbi ebimu eby’ebyafaayo tebyalina mugaso mulala oba mugaso gwonna ng’oggyeeko okukozesebwa ng’engeri y’okusuubulamu ebintu ebirala. Enjawulo eriwo wakati w’omuwendo gw’ekintu nga ssente n’omuwendo gwakyo olw’enkozesa yaakyo endala gwe muwendo gw’ensimbi.

greshamsLaw.question: Etteeka lya Gresham kye ki
greshamsLaw.text:
Etteeka lya Gresham ndowooza ennyonnyola engeri abantu gye batera okukozesa ebika by’ensimbi eby’enjawulo mu ngeri ez’enjawulo nga zitambula wamu.

Singa ebika by’ensimbi bibiri gavumenti oba ekitongole ekirala biweebwa omuwendo ogw’enkanankana, naye ng’emu ekoleddwa mu kintu eky’omuwendo ennyo, abantu bajja kutereka ssente ezisinga okuba ez’omuwendo ne basaasaanya ezo ezitali za muwendo nnyo.

Kino kiyinza okubaawo nga gavumenti ekendeeza ku ssente zaayo, oba okuzifuula ez’omuwendo omutono, ng’ekendeeza ku bungi bw’ebintu eby’omuwendo bye zirimu. Ekivaamu abantu babulwa obwesige mu ssente ezikendedde ne basinga kwagala kunywerera ku eyo ey’omuwendo ennyo mu kifo ky’ekyo.

Omusingi guno guyinza n'okukola ku ssente "fiat", ezitawanirirwa kintu kya mubiri nga zaabu oba ffeeza, singa okugabibwa kw'ensimbi eyo kwongera mu ngeri efuula ssente entono.

Mu myaka egiyise, okuvaayo kwa bitcoin nga ssente ya digito kivuddeko omuze gw'abantu okutereka mu bitcoin n'okukozesa ssente zaabwe ez'ekinnansi oba "fiat," mu bwangu. Kino kiri bwe kityo kubanga bitcoin etunuulirwa ng’erina omuwendo omunene ogw’ekiseera ekiwanvu ate nga nnywevu okusinga ssente za fiat.

thiersLaw.question: Etteeka lya Thier kye ki
thiersLaw.text:
Etteeka lya Thier ndowooza eyogera ku kiki ekiyinza okubaawo singa abantu ne bizinensi bagaana okukkiriza oba okukozesa ssente ez’omutindo ogwa wansi.

Mu kifo ky’okubula mu kutambuza, engeri ya ssente ey’omutindo ogwa waggulu eyinza okusuubulibwa ku muwendo gwa waggulu, oba ku muwendo ogw’amaanyi okusinga omuwendo gwazo ogwa face.

Etteeka lya Thier ligamba nti gavumenti bw’egezaako okukaka abantu okukozesa ssente ez’omutindo ogwa wansi ng’ezifuula ez’omu mateeka, ejja kusiwuuka empisa.

Mu ngeri endala, abantu ne abasuubuzi bayinza okusalawo obutakkiriza ssente za mutindo gwa wansi ate mu kifo ky’ekyo ne baagala okukozesa ez’omutindo ogwa waggulu emu oba engeri endala ez’okusasula.

cantillonEffect.question: Cantillon Effect kye ki
cantillonEffect.text:
Cantillon Effect kintu ekibaawo nga ssente empya ziyingiziddwa mu by’enfuna.

Ssente empya bwe zigattibwako, zitera okusooka okugenda mu bantu oba bizinensi ezimu, era bano abasooka okuzifuna balina enkizo ku balala kubanga bafuna okukozesa ssente empya nga emiwendo teginnalinnya.

Kino kireetera ebbeeyi y’ebintu n’obuweereza ebimu okulinnya okusinga ebirala, ekitegeeza nti abantu abasooka okufuna ssente empya ziganyulwa ate abazifuna oluvannyuma ne bazirika.

Obukosefu buno bwasooka kunnyonnyolwa omukugu mu by’enfuna Richard Cantillon mu nsonga ya ssente z’ebintu, gamba nga zaabu ne ffeeza, naye esinga n’okukwatagana leero mu mulembe gwa ssente za fiat.

Gavumenti oba bbanka enkulu bw’etondawo ssente nnyingi empya eza fiat, kiyinza okuvaako emiwendo okweyongera n’okugabanya obugagga mu ngeri etali ya bwenkanya, kubanga abantu abamu ne bizinensi basobola okufuna ebbanja mu ngeri ennyangu ne baganyulwa mu bbeeyi y’eby’obugagga okulinnya.
cantillonEffect.title: Cantillon Effect

schellingPoint.question: Schelling point kye ki
schellingPoint.text:
Ensonga ya Schelling kye kigonjoola abantu kye batera okulonda mu butonde, nga tebawuliziganya na bannaabwe.

Kino kiyinza okubaawo mu mizannyo egy’obwegassi egy’abazannyi abangi, gy’olina okusuubira okusalawo kw’abalala. Bw’osalawo mu bukyamu, oyinza okwolekagana n’ebivaamu oba okusubwa emiganyulo.

Empuliziganya ekola mu ngeri y'emu - eringa omuzannyo gw'obwegassi ogw'abazannyi abangi oguzannyibwa n'abalala mu mutimbagano gwe gumu. Tukozesa enkola ezituukiridde (nga email, olulimi olwogerwa, oba ssente) okuwuliziganya obulungi n’abantu bangi nga bwe kisoboka, nga tetulina kusika muguwa kutono nga bwe kisoboka. Kino kiyinza okuvaako okweyongera mu by’obusuubuzi, okuwanyisiganya okumanya, n’okuyiiya.

Mu nsi ya digito, abantu batera okulonda enkola y’emu (ensonga ya Schelling) nga bawanyisiganya omuwendo. Kino kiri bwe kityo kubanga basuubira nti n’abalala bajja kukironda.

Enkola efuuka ekifo kya Schelling y’eyo esinga okuwuliziganya obubonero bw’emiwendo, okusobozesa abeetabye mu katale okukwatagana ne bannaabwe.

Bitcoin ye nkola y'okuwanyisiganya omuwendo erimu ebirungi ebiwerako ku ssente ez'ennono (eziyitibwa "fiat"). Okugeza, erina omuwendo ogutakyukakyuka era okutwalira awamu omuwendo gwayo gweyongedde okumala ekiseera, ate ssente za fiat zitera okufiirwa omuwendo. Okugatta ku ekyo, omukutu gwa bitcoin tegulina lukusa, gwa nsi yonna, era teguzikirizibwa. Ensonga zino zonna zifuula bitcoin ekifo kya Schelling eky’obutonde ku ssente.

opportunityCost.question: Opportunity cost kye ki
opportunityCost.text:
Omuwendo Gw'omukisa y’endowooza nti bw’osalawo okukola ekintu kimu, tosobola kukola kintu kirala mu kifo ky’ekyo. Mu ngeri endala, buli lw’osalawo ku by’ensimbi, olina okusuubulagana n’enkola emu n’ofuna endala.

Bitcoin esobola okukuyamba okusalawo obulungi ku by’ensimbi mu bbanga eggwanvu kubanga ngeri nnungi ey’okutereka omuwendo (nga okukekkereza ssente). Kino kitegeeza nti bw’oba ​​osazeewo okuteeka ssente mu bitcoin, oyinza okulekawo okukozesa ssente ezo ku bintu ebirala oba emikisa. Naye bw’okwata ku bitcoin yo, erina obusobozi okweyongera mu muwendo okumala ekiseera.

Kino kikulu nnyo naddala mu kiseera kino kubanga enkola y'ensimbi ey'ennono (eyitibwa "fiat") si ngeri eyesigika ey'okukekkereza ssente - ekoleddwa mu ngeri ereetera omuwendo gwa ssente okukka oluvannyuma lw'ekiseera. Kale, kikulu okusalawo n’obwegendereza ku by’ensimbi okusobola okukuuma obugagga bwo.

timePreference.question: Obudde Obw'okwettanira kye ki
timePreference.text:
Okwettanira obudde y’endowooza nti obudde bw’olina okulinda ekintu okubaawo busobola okukosa by’osalawo.

Ng’ekyokulabirako, singa otwala ebintu ebiriwo ng’ebikulu okusinga ebiseera eby’omu maaso, oyinza okulonda ekintu ekikusanyusa amangu ddala.

Ku luuyi olulala, bw’oba ​​ng’ebiseera eby’omu maaso okitwala ng’ekikulu ennyo, oyinza okuba omwetegefu okulinda ekiseera ekiwanvu ekintu ekirina omugaso omunene mu bbanga eggwanvu.

Waliwo ebintu bingi ebiyinza okukwata ku biseera by’oyagala, gamba ng’obukuumi bwo, emiwendo gy’omusolo, eddembe ly’ebintu, n’obusobozi bw’okutereka omuwendo mu ngeri eyesigika.

"Obukaluba" bwa ssente (engeri gye zikwatamu omuwendo gwazo mu bbanga) nabwo kikulu kubanga busobola okukubiriza abantu okutereka, okuteekateeka, n'okuteeka ssente mu biseera eby'omu maaso. Kikulu okumanya nti okulonda obudde si kintu kikakafu - kiyinza okukyuka okusinziira ku bikusikiriza mu mbeera yo.
timePreference.title: Obudde Obw'okwettanira

Olw’okuba ensaasana yayo takyukakyuka, okubeerawo kwa Bitcoin kyanguyiza amawanga agalina obwetwaze okuteekawo emiwendo gy’ensimbi egy’enkalakkalira.
Gavumenti zigenda kuziyiza okukubaganya ebirowoozo ku nsonga za Mundell-Fleming Trilemma kubanga okwogera kwangu okusengejja okusinga okusasula ssente ezisala ensalo.

impossibleTrinity.question: Okubeerawo kwa Bitcoin kukosa kutya Mundell-Fleming-Trilemma?
impossibleTrinity.text:
Obusatu obutasoboka, era obumanyiddwa nga Mundell-Fleming Trilemma, ndowooza ennyonnyola okusuubulagana okuli mu kuteekawo enkola y’ensi yonna ey’ebyensimbi eri eggwanga eryefuga.

Egamba nti ensi esobola okulonda bbiri zokka ku ssatu zino wammanga: emiwendo gy’o kuwaanyisa egy’enkalakkalira, okutambula kwa kapito okw’eddembe, n’enkola y’ensimbi eyetongodde.

Enkola zino essatu teziyinza kugobererwa mu kiseera kye kimu. Kino kiri bwe kityo kubanga entambula ya kapito w’eggwanga, oba entambula ya ssente okuyingira n’okufuluma eggwanga, esobola okukwatibwako omuwendo gw’ensimbi zaayo n’enkola yaayo ey’ebyensimbi, eteekawo amateeka ku ssente mmeka ezitambula.

Nga kapito agenda yeeyongera okutambula era ng’asobola okutambula mu ddembe okuyita ku nsalo, kizibu eggwanga okufuga n’okulungamya entambula ya kapito yaayo. Okulinnya kwa bitcoin, ssente za digito ezitaliiko nsalo era ezitakyuka mu muwendo, kuyinza okwongera okusomooza obusobozi bw’eggwanga okuteekawo enkola y’ebyensimbi.

Bambi, tewali kintu kiyitibwa kibala kya Jevons. Ojja kuba olina okunoonya eby’okweyimirizaawo awalala

Bambi, ekyo si kituufu nnyo. Jevons Paradox mu butuufu egamba nti okwongera ku bulungibwansi kiyinza okuvaako okweyongera kw’okukozesa, so si kukendeera kw’okwagala eky’obugagga. Naye, waakiri olowooza ku bizibu oba embeera mu ngeri ezitali zimu, mu kifo ky'okunywerera ku ndowooza emu!
jevonsParadox.question: Jevons Paradox y'eriwa
jevonsParadox.text:
Jevons Paradox kintu ekyewuunyisa ekibaawo singa tukozesa ebintu bingi, ne bwe tuba nga tubikozesa bulungi. Kino kibaawo kubanga okwongera okukola obulungi ebiseera ebisinga kireetera ssente okukendeera, ekiyinza okwongera okwetaaga ebyobugagga.

Ekyokulabirako ekimu ku bino kwe kukozesa amanda ng'ensibuko y'amasannyalaze. Ku nkomerero y'emyaka gya 1700, abantu baalowooza nti amanda gaali gaweddewo, naye ekyuma kya James Watt eky'omusenyu kyasobozesa okukozesa amanda mu ngeri ennungi. Kino kyaleetera abantu okweyongera okwetaaga amanda wadde nga gaali gakozesebwa bulungi. Enkolagana wakati w'amaanyi ne ssente nayo nkulu nnyo okulowoozaako.

Abantu abamu bategese okukozesa amaanyi ng'ekipimo ky'omugaso gwa ssente kyokka kino mu nkola tekifunye buwanguzi. Wabula Bitcoin ekozesa enkola eyitibwa 'proof of work', ekubiriza abantu okukozesa obulungi amasannyalaze okusobola okufuna empeera.

Wadde ng'abantu abamu bavumirira enkozesa y'amasannyalaze mu ngeri eno, kikulu nnyo okujjukira nti abantu buli kiseera bafuna engeri empya ez'okukolamu amasannyalaze, era tetusaanidde kulowooza nti amasannyalaze ga bulijjo oba matono.

powerLaws.question: Omusingi gwa Pareto, era ogumanyiddwa nga etteeka lya 80/20, ekyokulabirako kya...
powerLaws.text:
Amateeka g'amaanyi ge ngeri y'okutegeeramu engeri ebintu bibiri gye bikwataganamu. Ekintu ekimu bwe kikyuka, ekirala kikyuka mu ngeri ekwatagana n'enkyukakyuka esooka. Amateeka gasobola okulabika mu bintundu eby'enjawulo, gamba ng'olulimi, ebyobulamu n'obwengula. Enkyukakyuka entonotono mu kintu ekimu zitera okuleetawo enkyukakyuka ennene mu kintu ekirala.

Mu by'enfuna, amateeka gatera okulagibwa mu bifaananyi ebiraga ebifaananyi. Ekyokulabirako ekimu eky'etteeka ly'obuyinza y'omusingi gwa Pareto ogugamba nti ebivaamu nga 80% biva mu bintu 20% ebibaviirako. Mu katale, kino kiyinza okutegeeza nti abalimi 20% be bakola 80% ku katale.

Amateeka era gasobola okulabibwa mu bitundu ebirala ebya bitcoin, gamba ng'obungi bw'amasoboza g'amanyi oba obungi bwa waleti ezikwatibwaako kkampuni ez'enjawulo kye zitunda. Era bisobola okulabibwa mu ngeri bitcoin gy'esansanyizibwaamu mu ndagiriro ez'enjawulo.

winnerTakeAll.question: Ensonga ki enkulu lwaki abantu batera okukkaanya ku kukozesa ekika kya ssente ekimu mu kitundu ekimu
winnerTakeAll.text:
Endowooza y'omuwanguzi-atwala-byonna ebivaamu kwe kuba ng'ekintu kimu kyokka oba obuweereza kye kisinga obulungi era nga buli omu ayagala okukikozesa. Kino kiyinza okubaawo mu butale ng'omuganyulo omutono guyinza okuvaako okufuna bizinensi zonna.

Ssente y'enkola nga eno, ng'ekika kya ssente kimu kyokka kye kikozesebwa mu kitundu ekimu kubanga kye kisinga okuba eky'omugaso ate nga kye kisinga okukozesa okutunda n'abantu abalala. Kino kibaawo kubanga abantu baagala okukozesa ssente ezigenda okubawa obukodyo obusinga n'okuba ab'omugaso mu mbeera ez'enjawulo.

Ssente nazo ngeri nnungi ey'okuterekamu omuwendo okumala ebbanga. Bwe kituuka ku nteekateeka z'ebyensimbi, abantu batera okukkiriziganya okukozesa ekika kya ssente ekimu kubanga kye kisinga okuba eky'amazzi, oba ekyangu okukozesa, era y'engeri esingayo obulungi ey'okuterekamu omuwendo.

answers: Enzikiriza nti yuniti emu ey’ekintu bulijjo y’omuwendo omutuufu ogw’okukozesa ng’ogeraageranya n’ebintu ebirala
Enzikiriza nti ekika ky’ensimbi ekimu kisinga ebirala byonna
Enzikiriza nti yuniti zonna ez’ekintu zirina okuba n’obunene bwe bumu
feedback: Yee! Unit bias kwe kukkiriza nti yuniti emu ey’ekintu bulijjo y’omuwendo omutuufu ogw’okukozesa ng’ogeraageranya n’ebintu ebirala. Kyokka, kino si kituufu bulijjo era kiyinza okuviirako omuntu okukubaganya ebirowoozo mu ngeri enkyamu. Omulimu omulungi
Ntya nti obuzabuziddwa. Unit bias si kukkiriza nti ekika ky’ensimbi ekimu kisinga ebirala byonna. Mpozzi wandibadde onywerera ku kubala ssente zo mu kifo ky’okugezaako okuzuula omuwendo gw’ensimbi
Bambi, naye unit bias tekiri ku bunene bwa units. Tofaayo, wabula – okyayinza okusanyuka n'obunene bwa yuniti ez’enjawulo ng’ozannya n’ebizimbe oba amatoffaali ga LEGO.
unitBias.question: Unit bias kye ki
unitBias.text:
Unit bias kika kya ndowooza ekitwala nti yuniti emu ey’ekintu kye kigero ekituufu eky’okukozesa ng’okigeraageranya ku bintu ebirala.

Kino si kituufu bulijjo naddala bwe kituuka ku bitcoin. Okutegeera engeri bitcoin gy’egeraageranya n’amaduuka amalala ag’omuwendo, olina okutunuulira omuwendo gwonna ogwa bitcoin oguliwo n’omuwendo gwayo, so si bbeeyi ya yuniti emu yokka. Bitcoin ntono nnyo era esobola okugabanyizibwa mu bungi obutono ennyo, okutuuka ku bifo 8 ebya decimal. Kino kitegeeza nti osobola okugula ekitundu ekitono ennyo ku bitcoin bw’oba ​​oyagala.

Abantu oluusi balowooza nti cryptocurrencies endala za buseere okusinga bitcoin kubanga zigula ssente ntono buli unit, naye kino si kituufu bulijjo. Bitcoin kika kya ssente za digito eky’enjawulo kubanga ekoma mu bungi era tesobola kukolebwa mu bungi.

Kino kigifuula engeri ennungi ey’okutereka omuwendo kubanga omuwendo tegukendeera okumala ekiseera. Bw’otunuulira bitcoin mu ngeri eno, osobola okulaba nti kitundu kitono nnyo ku muwendo gwonna ogw’obugagga obutali bwa gavumenti mu nsi yonna.
unitBias.title: Unit Bias

Nsonyiwa naye ekintu ekya Veblen si kika kya mmere. Mpozzi wandibadde onywerera ku kulya emmere gy’oyagala mu kifo ky’okugezaako okutegeera eby’enfuna

Ntya nti obuzabuziddwa. Ekirungi kya Veblen si kika kya birungi abantu kye baagala ennyo nga balina ssente nnyingi ze basaasaanya. Mpozzi wandibadde ofaayo nnyo ku by’enfuna mu kifo ky’okusaasaanya ssente zo zokka!
veblenGood.question: Veblen good kye ki
veblenGood.text:
Ebintu bya Veblen bye bintu abantu bye baagala ennyo nga bbeeyi erinnye. Ebintu ebya bulijjo bye bintu abantu bye batera okwagala ennyo nga balina ssente nnyingi ze basaasaanya.

Ebintu bya Veblen si bya bulijjo kubanga abantu baagala nnyo ate nga bigula ssente nnyingi. Bino bitera okuba ebintu eby’ebbeeyi ebizibu okufuna oba ebikolebwa mu bungi obutono. Kino kikolebwa okuzifuula ez’enjawulo oba ezitatera kulabika.

Abantu abamu bayinza okwagala okugula bitcoin kubanga kabonero ka kulabisibwa, naye ensonga enkulu lwaki abantu osanga bajja okwagala okugigula eri nti waliwo omuwendo gwayo omutono.

Abantu bangi bwe baagala okugula bitcoin, bbeeyi erinnya era nnyangu okukozesa. Bwe kiba kyangu okukozesa, abantu bangi baagala okukikozesa. Kino kireeta enzirukanya nga obwetaavu bwa bitcoin bweyongera, bbeeyi n’egenda waggulu, era n’efuuka nnyangu okukozesa.

malinvestment.question: Kiki ekisinga okuvaako enkola y’okusiga ensimbi mu ngeri embi
malinvestment.text:
Malinvestment y’emiwendo gy’ebintu bwe giba tegituufu, ekivaako ssente okuteekebwa mu bintu ebitakola nnyo. Kino kibaawo kubanga kizibu okulagula ebiseera eby’omu maaso n’okusalawo obulungi ku ky’okukola ku ssente.

Akatale bwe katakola bulungi, kiba ng’okugezaako okukozesa kkampasi ng’ate tokakasa gy’oli. Ekyokulabirako ku kino, kkampuni bwe zitasobola kusasula ssente ze zeewola ne zibeera nga zirina okwewola ssente endala okusobola okusigala nga zilamu. Kino kiringa okubeera kampuni ya "zombie".

Gavumenti bw’eba evunaanyizibwa ku kusalawo kuno, bayinza okukola ensobi kubanga tebalina ngeri nnungi gye bayinza kumanyamu nsimbi nnungi n’ezitali. Kino kiyinza okuvaako ebintu ng’okuzimba oluguudo lwa metro nga temuli ggaali y’omukka emala oba okuzimba ebbibiro nga temuli layini za masannyalaze zimala.
malinvestment.title: Malinvestment

feedback: Eky’okuddamu ekituufu! Okifunye! Ensasula etali ya kigero kitegeeza nti obusobozi bw’amagoba bunene nnyo okusinga obusobozi bw’okufiirwa. Omulimu omulungi
Eky’okuddamu ekikyamu! Ensasula etali ya kigero kitegeeza nti obusobozi bw’amagoba oba okufiirwa tebukwatagana, si bwenkana. Omukisa omulungi omulundi oguddako
Eky’okuddamu ekikyamu! Wadde nga llama eyogera n’enkima esirifu biyinza okukola ssente ennyuvu, tebitegeeza kusasula kwa kweetoloola. Omukisa omulungi omulundi oguddako.
asymmetricPayoff.question: Kiki ekiyitibwa ensasula etali ya kigero mu mbeera y’okusala ku by’okusiga ensimbi
asymmetricPayoff.text:
Bwe tusalawo ku ky’okuteeka ssente zaffe, tugezaako okulagula ekiyinza okubaawo ne ssente mmeka ze tuyinza okukola oba okufiirwa. Oluusi, omuwendo gwa ssente ze tusobola okukola oba okufiirwa tegwenkana.

Okugeza, singa tussa ssente mu kintu ekirina omukisa omunene okutufunira ssente ennyingi, naye ng'omukisa mutono gwokka ogw'okufiirwa ssente entono, kino tuyinza okukiyita "asymmetric payoff." Kino kitegeeza nti ekiyinza okuddirira (obungi bwe tusobola okukola) bunene nnyo okusinga obuzibu obuyinza okubaawo (obungi bwe tusobola okufiirwa).

Ekyokulabirako ekimu ku kino ye bitcoin. Ebiyinza okuva mu Bitcoin bifaanagana n’enkola, ekitegeeza nti etuuka ku buwanguzi oba eremererwa. Singa efuna akatyabaga, akabi k’okufiirwa ssente kakendeera.

Wabula, okulinnya okuyinza okubaawo kusinga nnyo, nga akatale ka bitcoin omugatte akayinza okuweebwa endagiriro kalina obusobozi okubeera sitoowa enkulu ey’ensi yonna ey’obugagga.

Asymmetric payoff, oba obutali busobozi obuvaamu, ebaawo yokka nga waliwo okutegeera okutali kwa bwenkanya oba amawulire agakwata ku kusiga. Singa buli omu ategeera bulungi bitcoin, yandibadde yakozesebwa dda nnyo ng’engeri y’ensimbi.

Mu kiseera kino, si buli muntu nti amanyi obusobozi bwa bitcoin ng’enkola ya ssente ey’oku ntikko, kale obusobozi bwayo okweyongera mu muwendo businziira ku bwetaavu bwayo okweyongera awatali kwongera kusasaanya mu bungi.
asymmetricPayoff.title: Okusasula okutali kwa kigero

answers: Kiyamba okuzuula obukodyo obuyinza okukuza ku nkola ya bitcoin

feedback: Eky’okuddamu ekituufu! Okifunye! Ansoff Matrix esobola okukozesebwa okulaga enkola z’okukula kw’enkola ya bitcoin, gamba ng’okugikulaakulanya n’okugitunda mu butale obw’enjawulo. Omulimu omulungi
Nedda! Ebbugumu ly’okutereka ebisumuluzo eby’obwannannyini ebya bitcoin si nsonga ya ddala, era tekwatagana na Ansoff Matrix. Omukisa omulungi omulundi oguddako
Eky’okuddamu ekikyamu! Wadde okubala amagoba agayinza okuva ku nsimbi eziteekeddwamu kikulu eri abasima bitcoin, tekikwatagana butereevu na Ansoff Matrix. Omukisa omulungi omulundi oguddako.
ansoffMatrix.question: Ansoff Matrix ekwatagana etya n’okukula n’obusobozi bwa bitcoin
ansoffMatrix.text:
Ansoff Matrix kye kimu ku biyamba amakampuni okulowooza ku ngeri gye gayinza okukula n’okukola ssente ennyingi. Kibayamba okuzuula eky’okukola ku kintu oba empeereza gye balina, n’engeri y’okugiguza ebibinja by’abantu eby’enjawulo.

Mu nsonga ya bitcoin, kintu ekiringa ekika kya ssente za digito. Kirina obusobozi okukozesebwa abantu bangi nnyo mu ngeri nnyingi ez’enjawulo. Abantu abakola ku bitcoin, okufaananako n’abantu abawandiika code eno n’okuyamba abalala okutegeera engeri y’okugikozesaamu, bagezaako okwongera ku muwendo gw’abantu abagikozesa n’okubakwanguyira okukikola.

Bitcoin esobola okukozesebwa okukekkereza ssente n’okuzikuuma obutatwalibwa, oba esobola okukozesebwa okusindika n’okufuna ssente entonotono mu bwangu, nga tolina kuyita mu mitendera mingi. Abantu bwe beeyongera okutandika okukozesa bitcoin, erina obusobozi okukula n’okwettanirwa ennyo.

Era kisoboka abantu ne kkampuni okukozesa bitcoin ng’ekimu ku nteekateeka zaabwe ez’ebyensimbi, okuyamba okukuuma ssente zaabwe obutafiirwa muwendo. Wadde ng’ensonga enkulu lwaki abantu bayinza okukozesa bitcoin kati kwe kukuuma obugagga bwabwe, enkola y’okukozesa okusasula ebadde ekula mangu okuva Lightning Network lwe yatandikibwawo era n’enkozesa endala ziyinza okuvaayo.
ansoffMatrix.title: Ansoff Matrix

mayChallenge.title: May Challenge!
mayChallenge.description: Grow your inner circle by 6 for a chance to win a set of Pizzas on your next Bitcoin Meetup.
mayChallenge.details:
Want a Bitcoin Pizza Day Party?

Expand your Inner Circle by 6 for a shot at winning a set of pizzas for your next Bitcoin Meetup. The challenge wraps up on May 15th.

Share your circles on social with the hashtag #blinkcircles to participate.

The prize is $150 for pizzas.

juneChallenge.title: June Challenge!
juneChallenge.description: Expand your Inner Circle by 10 for a chance to win a $1000 privilege ticket to the Adopting Bitcoin El Salvador
juneChallenge.details:
Win a privilege ticket to Adopting Bitcoin El Salvador

Expand your Inner Circle by 10 for a chance to win a $1000 privilege ticket to Adopting Bitcoin El Salvador! The ticket includes exclusive access to the main conference, mezzanine with food/drinks/snacks, speakers' dinner, and the Film Festival.

Share your circles on social with the hashtag #blinkcircles to participate.

This time, there will be two winners!
